THECURSEDMOD-BLACK_MAGIC101_RELIC.title: Black Magic 101
THECURSEDMOD-BLACK_MAGIC101_RELIC.descri: If your [gold]Draw pile[/gold] has any [gold]Curse[/gold] card at the start of your turn, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card.
THECURSEDMOD-BLACK_MAGIC101_RELIC.flavor: Learn about black magic now!!!  (5th Edition)
If your [gold]Draw pile[/gold] has any [gold]Curse[/gold] card at the start of your turn, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards.
All about Forbidden power and its Karma.  (First Edition)
THECURSEDMOD-SPIRIT_FUEL_RELIC.title: Spirit Fuel
THECURSEDMOD-SPIRIT_FUEL_RELIC.descripti: If a [gold]Rite[/gold] effect is triggered at least once during your turn, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card next turn.
THECURSEDMOD-SPIRIT_FUEL_RELIC.flavor: The soul burns bright — if only for a moment.
THECURSEDMOD-FOUR_LEAF_CLOVER_CHARM_RELI: Whenever you get a random [gold]Curse[/gold] card by [purple]The Cursed[/purple]'s card effect during combat, get [gold]Dregs[/gold] instead.
Good luck and happiness come from gratitude.
THECURSEDMOD-PURPLE_CANDLE_RELIC.title: Purple Candle
THECURSEDMOD-PURPLE_CANDLE_RELIC.descrip: Every [blue]10[/blue] times an effect of [gold]Circle[/gold] is triggered, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
THECURSEDMOD-PURPLE_CANDLE_RELIC.flavor: Its flame dims with each echo, and brightens with each reward.
THECURSEDMOD-WRAITH_BEADS_RELIC.title: Wraith Beads
THECURSEDMOD-WRAITH_BEADS_RELIC.descript: If you lost HP from [gold]Karma[/gold] this turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards next turn.
THECURSEDMOD-WRAITH_BEADS_RELIC.flavor: Each bead holds the memory of a wound endured.
THECURSEDMOD-RITUALISTS_RING_RELIC.title: Ritualist's Ring
THECURSEDMOD-RITUALISTS_RING_RELIC.descr: Every [blue]6[/blue] times a [gold]Rite[/gold] effect is triggered, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
THECURSEDMOD-DEMONIC_MARK_RELIC.title: Demonic Mark
THECURSEDMOD-DEMONIC_MARK_RELIC.descript: Every [blue]4[/blue] times an effect of [gold]Circle[/gold] is triggered in a single turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
THECURSEDMOD-DEMONIC_MARK_RELIC.flavor: It looks different this time, doesn't it?
THECURSEDMOD-SOUL_VESSEL_RELIC.title: Soul Vessel
THECURSEDMOD-SOUL_VESSEL_RELIC.descripti: At the end of combat, heal [blue]2[/blue] HP per [gold]Rite[/gold] effect triggered this combat. (Max [blue]10[/blue] HP.)
THECURSEDMOD-SOUL_VESSEL_RELIC.flavor: The vessel remembers every soul it has consumed.
